/api/a11oy/v1/lambda.note: Λ governance score — derived/deterministic, Conjecture-1 honest.

/api/a11oy/v1/mcp/tools.note: Returns the 4 real flagship tools; never the fabricated 12.

/api/a11oy/cosign.pub.note: Public signing key for offline receipt verification.

/api/a11oy/v2/operator/command-log.note: Append-only command log; quiet != stale, so no freshness SLA.

/api/a11oy/v1/policy/threats.note: Curated, citation-gated policy threat catalog (not a live feed); judged on citations, not freshness.

/api/a11oy/v1/vert/finance/feed.note: Live Yahoo/macro finance feed; cold-burst 404 tolerated, re-probe.

/api/a11oy/v1/deva/healthz.note: deva feed health — lists the live tabs[]; warm before judging deep tabs.

/api/a11oy/v1/feeds/pulse.note: Live data-feed liveness/provenance heartbeat; each item cites source_url.

/api/a11oy/v1/sec/kevgate.note: Live CISA KEV -> deny-by-default gate impact; gates_fired is the real engine result.

/api/a11oy/v1/router/stats.note: Live LLM-router per-tier stats from szl_brain.TIERS; throughput is an honest in-memory counter.

/api/a11oy/v1/scaling/summary.note: Deterministic scaling overview: status legend + author sources (Kleiber 1932 / WBE 1997 / Banavar 1999 / Brown 2004 / Demetrius-Tuszynski 2010 / Kaplan 2020) + worked examples. VERIFIED reproductions; SZL-Φ PROPOSED, NOT formal Λ.

/api/a11oy/v1/scaling/exponents.note: Deterministic catalog of universal scaling exponents, each row attributed (cite=). VERIFIED documented values.

/api/a11oy/v1/scaling/compute.note: Compute-capability-as-allometry mapping (Kaplan et al. 2020 neural scaling); status=PROPOSED analogy, NOT formal Λ.

/api/a11oy/v1/scaling/kleiber.note: Kleiber 1932 B=B0·M^(3/4) basal metabolic rate; requires ?M=<kg>. Empty M validates (400/422). VERIFIED deterministic (70kg -> 1694.03 kcal/day).

/api/a11oy/v1/scaling/mte.note: Brown et al. 2004 MTE Boltzmann-factor metabolic rate; requires ?M=<kg>. Empty M validates (400/422). VERIFIED deterministic.

/api/a11oy/v1/scaling/heart.note: MTE-derived heart-rate/lifespan allometry; requires ?M=<kg>. Empty M validates (400/422). VERIFIED deterministic (70kg -> 83.32 bpm).

/api/a11oy/v1/scaling/unified.note: SZL unified Φ (WBE network × MTE/PMF activation × coherence); requires ?M=<kg>. status=PROPOSED, note carries 'Λ=Conjecture 1'. PROPOSED engineering construct, NOT the formal Λ, NOT in the locked 8.

/api/a11oy/v1/readiness/tab-matrix.note: This contract, served live — the harness verifies served == repo.
